queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit risk probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Statistical impact of present employment duration less than one year on the likelihood of credit default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evidence regarding the correlation between checking account balances below zero and decreased credit risk.
